_source: LA Mission College standardized Time Blocks (Academic Affairs): 2024 Fall, 2024 Summer, 2024/2025 Winter, 2025 Spring. Start times only — a section is 'on grid' when its start matches one of its term-length's standard starts (within a few minutes). Union across class types / meeting patterns / session lengths within each term length, so the check flags genuinely off-grid starts with low false positives.
_term_lengths: Term code last digit -> length: 8=Fall and 2=Spring -> '16-week'; 1=Winter -> 'winter'; 6=Summer -> 'summer'.
